== Notes for [[Item:Q115634|Q115634]] ==

https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/details/GPJ1-QHZ

https://www.wikitree.com/wiki/De_Toledo-24

See http://trees.ancestry.com/tree/25067072/person/12798846660

Pag. 3

https://docplayer.com.br/22396495-Jeronimo-de-albuquerque-o-adao-pernambucano-e-a-origem-multietnica-do-
homem-nordestino.html

https://cjbrasil.org/jeronimo-de-albuquerque-o-adao-pernambucano-e-a-origem-multietnica-do-homem-nordestino/#:~:text=Mas%20Brites%20e%20Jerônimo%20também,Castela%20(1155%20–%201214).

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
